reviews.review_title: Game copied grab and gorilla tag
reviews.review_description: If you look at the gameplay of editor it looks and feels like if grab never left beta. And the button layout also copied grab. It copied gorilla tag with the map and in city there’s just one room and you can tell they stole that from unity shop or something. I know all of this as a person who has played grab since 2023 and gorilla tag since 2022

so ive been playing it on my pico four ultra since i fasted (2 years ago) and i loved the game has been the only game ive played ever since i feel extremely happy because its on meta and also could get more english people yk because nearly the whole ctag community is like Chinese people which i dont under stand what they are saying
The little cat is absolutely adorable. The way it walks is also so amusing!

is now on meta but what abut steam vr

reviews.review_title: This is just grab vr but more blocks

reviews.review_description: So me and my friend decided to play this game coz it looked fun but it rlly wasn’t just a bunch of copyright you can see gorrila tag textures and you tried your hardest to steal grab textures and changed the bounce block to cheese? And copyrighted music? Pls just make your game better
